title: teline paivae
intro: Teline paivae, also known as the Tuamotu or Tahitian clover, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and soothe digestive issues. Its health benefits include its potential to alleviate symptoms of irritable bowel syndrome and other gastrointestinal disorders. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
